text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Jingle bells, jingle bells, jingle all the wayyy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(We were never able to do much for the holidays.
But ya know what?)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(They were still cozy 'n fun. The kiddos had a
great time too...)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: (This year, though...)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: (I'm in hell... Hahaha... My own personal hell...)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nghhh... I can't... eat. Not even a single stinkin'
bite...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's mid-December and Tamamo Cross, crushed by
the ever-mounting pressure, has completely lost
her appetite.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Why? Why's this happenin' to me... We're so
close...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
C'mon dummy, ya know how to eat... Just hold in
there a liiittle longer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unless she consumes some calories, both training
and racing will be completely out of the question.
Tamamo Cross is in a real bind.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If I don't eat, I'm not gonna be able to push
myself. And if I don't push myself, I'm never
gonna beat her...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I just wanna fight her with everythin' I got! That's
all I want!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Aw man... Sorry my body's not cooperatin'... I
gotta figure this out somehow...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sheer will isn't going to solve this. On the
contrary, getting anxious will only weaken her
appetite.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, she'll drop out of the running before
she's even had the chance to try her best, and her
legacy will be one of failure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I leap into action for Tamamo Cross's sake—not
as her trainer, but as her partner.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Tamtam's trainer. Is something the
matter?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my. You've managed to pinpoint one of my
hidey-holes. That's quite the accomplishment.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: So, who might you be? And how may I help?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding dong!
Coming! Who is—

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Mother
text_block_list.text: W-wait, aren't you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I run around every possible place I can think of.
Then, one day in late December...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to disturb ya, Trainer... But I'm not in the
mood for a party right now.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
There's only one thing I want right now, and it's
not somethin' you can wrap up with a ribbon on
top.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And I really don't think I could stomach even the
sight of chicken 'n cake, so... just lemme get some
rest...
choice_data_list: Take a look at the table.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The heck is this spread? There isn't a single
festive dish here.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It just looks like some regular ol' meal. No
decorations either...
choice_data_list: Try some. Just have as much as you can.
Try some. Just have as much as you can.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, ya know I've only been managin' a single
mouthful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My investigative prowess, my analytical skills,
and even my sincerity were put to the test, but
I've done it. I've created the humblest holiday
meal in the world.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: All right. Here goes nothin'...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Cross places a morsel in her mouth...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wh-what the...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: This tastes... familiar. Not that familiar... but still...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It's delicious. And I'm not havin' any trouble
gettin' it down...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I wanna eat it. Smells real good too. What the heck did ya serve me here...
choice_data_list: Glad you like it. Eat up!
Glad you like it. Eat up!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah! I'm gonna dig right in!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch! Crunch, slurp! What the heck?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I thought of everything. Nutrition, Tamamo's tastes, her condition... All the angles I could possible cover.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I put my whole heart and mind into this dinner.
Let's just hope it's enough to sate her stomach.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I finally feel full... Like even my soul is content.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
How'd ya manage to cook this up? To make this
kinda meal... ya have to be thinkin' of someone
with all your heart...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You... figured everythin' out. My mom's flavors 'n
my preferences. Everythin' I need is right here...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: And ya made this all... for me....

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... I was wrong 'bout somethin'. Remember
me sayin' there was nothin' ya could give me?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Well, that was a lie. 'Cause deep down...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I think... this is what I really wanted. Somethin' that'd pull me back up.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeah... My strength lies in my "hunger." But...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nobody can live on an empty tummy—not even
me! And yet, I thought...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't win unless I had that hunger... So I threw
myself down a hole so deep, not even my family's
warmth could reach me...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Nothin' could break through all the darkness.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But this meal—your heart—broke through. Even
after I closed myself off from the world... this
meal gave me strength.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It helped me see... You and my folks at home...
You're all watchin' over me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No matter how far away it sometimes feels, as
long as there's that light shining through the
starving darkness...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I can run all the way! I can make it through the
Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt. I can feel it—Tamamo Cross
might have felt herself sinking into the depths of
despair, but now one last ray of hope shines down
on her.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, we only got a few days left. I want ya to
keep rustlin' me up dishes like this.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
With this feelin' I got and your full support, I
know I can pull through!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'll be a lightnin' bolt that strikes faster than Oguri
Cap can run! So, please...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The powdery snow flutters down from above like
confetti, celebrating the return of the White
Lightning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thunderclouds crackle. A lightning bolt falls from
the sky, but at the last second... it shoots back up
into the heavens like a dragon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thunderclouds crackle. A lightning bolt falls from
the sky, but at the last second... it shoots back up
into the heavens like a dragon.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Haha, nothin' like a stroll to help get the food
digestin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Let's keep walkin' for a bit longer. The town's
lookin' extra sparkly today.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oh wow, it's Tamamo Cross! There she goes!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yep! Happy holidays 'n thanks for all the support!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: So, who's your lucky date?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You dolt, we're not like that! This is just my
trainer...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Or maybe not...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeah. You're not just my trainer anymore.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Cross smiles cheekily.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're part of the fam! My dad knows it, my mom
knows it, even the li'l squirts know it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So go on, kids, go 'n tell your friends that
Tamamo Cross's family just got a new member!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yup. Anyone that knows me this well is family.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We've already gotten this close, so it's too late
for ya to back out now.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, let's head on home. We can get all toasty
under the kotatsu.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Tracen Academy well and truly becomes
a home away from home for Tamamo Cross.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And as a member of that new home, I vow to
bring her strength.
